en_title: Why Now Is the Perfect Time for a Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake
cn_title: 《塞尔达传说：时之笛》重制版为何选在此时推出
subtitle: 天时地利人和
opus_summary: 任天堂宣布为Nintendo Switch 2重制《塞尔达传说：时之笛》，预计今年晚些时候发售。文章分析了重制版推出的三大原因：3DS版已难以游玩、填补《塞尔达》系列新作之间的空窗期、以及为2027年上映的真人电影预热。

paragraphs.en: Well, it’s official: The 1998 Nintendo 64 classic, The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, is getting a brand new remake . It’s coming to Nintendo Switch 2 late this year, and even though we’ve seen very little of it, it already looks utterly gorgeous.
paragraphs.cn: 好吧，官方消息来了：1998年的N64经典之作《塞尔达传说 时之笛》将迎来全新重制版。它将于今年晚些时候登陆Nintendo Switch 2，尽管我们目前看到的还很少，但画面已经美得令人窒息。

paragraphs.en: This year marks the 40th anniversary of The Legend of Zelda series (and the almost -30th anniversary of this entry in particular), making now as good a time as any to bring this masterpiece back out to shine. But there are a few even bigger reasons why it’s the right move right now.
paragraphs.cn: 今年是《塞尔达传说》系列40周年（也是本作接近30周年），现在正是让这部杰作重焕光彩的好时机。但还有几个更重要的原因，说明为什么现在做重制版是正确之举。

paragraphs.en: Since you’re reading IGN, you already know and love video games, so I’ll save you the lengthy recap of why Ocarina of Time is so incredible. But let’s do the basics: It’s regularly near the top of every “Greatest Zelda Game of All Time” and “Greatest Video Game of All Time” lists. It revolutionized what a third person action-adventure game could look like, adding a whole new dimension to the rock-solid groundwork laid down by its 2D predecessor, A Link to the Past. Ocarina’s time jumping story is full of heart and humor, regularly engaging in epic conflicts, and between its meticulously crafted puzzle box dungeons and grand, sweeping vistas brimming with secrets and mysteries, it forever raised the bar for not only the Zelda series, but the medium of video games as a whole.
paragraphs.cn: 既然你在看IGN，说明你已经了解并热爱电子游戏，所以我就不长篇大论地解释《时之笛》为何如此惊人了。但简单来说：它常年位居各种「史上最佳塞尔达游戏」和「史上最佳电子游戏」榜单的前列。它彻底革新了第三人称动作冒险游戏的面貌，在2D前作《众神的三角力量》打下的坚实基础上增添了全新维度。《时之笛》的时间跳跃故事充满温情与幽默，时常卷入史诗般的冲突，而它精心设计的谜题箱庭式迷宫与广阔壮丽、充满秘密与谜团的景色，不仅为《塞尔达》系列，也为整个电子游戏媒介树立了永恒的标杆。

paragraphs.en: I have fond memories of saving up for Ocarina of Time for months when I was a kid, buying it the day it was released, and sitting on a curb in a Toys R Us parking lot, poring over the manual while waiting for my dad to pick me up and bring me home, where I’d go on to spend countless hours exploring Hyrule. It always and forever will be an outstanding game which I cherish dearly. IGN’s Peer Schneider gave it a 10 out of 10 back in 1998 , and I wholeheartedly still agree with that score.
paragraphs.cn: 我至今仍记得小时候攒了好几个月的钱买《时之笛》，发售当天就入手，然后坐在玩具反斗城停车场的路沿上，一边翻看说明书一边等爸爸来接我回家，之后便在海拉鲁度过了无数小时的探索时光。它永远是我珍视的杰出游戏。IGN的Peer Schneider在1998年给它打了10分满分，我至今仍完全认同这个分数。

paragraphs.en: But it’s also a game many of us have played already, and so you’re probably wondering exactly what Nintendo could do to differentiate this version of Ocarina of Time from every other version it has shipped since 1998. It’s even already been remade, back in 2011 for the Nintendo 3DS. So how could a Switch 2 remake possibly improve on that?
paragraphs.cn: 但这也是我们很多人已经玩过的游戏，所以你可能会好奇，任天堂究竟能做什么让这个版本的《时之笛》与1998年以来推出的所有其他版本有所不同。它甚至已经在2011年为Nintendo 3DS重制过一次了。那么Switch 2的重制版还能如何改进呢？

paragraphs.en: To potentially answer that question, look no further than the soon-to-be-released Switch 2 remake of Star Fox 64 . Not only is Star Fox also a beloved N64 game that has been ported to various Nintendo consoles, it also got a Nintendo 3DS remake in 2011. Like the Ocarina 3DS remake, it largely stuck to the original game’s blueprint while adding brand new graphics and dual screen features. And while the Star Fox franchise has never come close to Zelda’s popularity, the parallels across Ocarina of Time and Star Fox 64’s journey from the N64 to the 3DS to the Nintendo Switch 2 are fascinating to see.
paragraphs.cn: 要回答这个问题，只需看看即将推出的《星际火狐64》Switch 2重制版。不仅《星际火狐》也是一款备受喜爱的N64游戏，并移植到了多款任天堂主机上，它同样在2011年获得了Nintendo 3DS重制版。与《时之笛》3DS重制版类似，它基本沿用了原版游戏的框架，同时加入了全新画面和双屏功能。尽管《星际火狐》系列的人气从未接近《塞尔达》，但《时之笛》和《星际火狐64》从N64到3DS再到Nintendo Switch 2的历程，其相似之处令人着迷。

paragraphs.en: Star Fox perhaps offers a vision of what we can expect from Ocarina of Time. Its Switch 2 remake has a completely overhauled art style with stunning new graphics, fully re-recorded voices, sound effects, and music, and tons of new features, modes, and additional bells and whistles. Sure, the 2011 remake also boasted visual improvements over the original, but seeing the 3DS and Switch 2 remakes of Star Fox side by side will show you that Nintendo isn’t just phoning it in and making a quick buck off of nostalgia.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际火狐》或许为我们展示了《时之笛》重制版可以期待的样子。它的Switch 2重制版拥有完全翻新的艺术风格、惊艳的新画面、完全重新录制的配音、音效和音乐，以及大量新功能、模式和附加内容。诚然，2011年的重制版相比原版也有画面提升，但将3DS和Switch 2的《星际火狐》重制版放在一起对比，你就会发现任天堂并非敷衍了事、靠情怀捞快钱。

paragraphs.en: Looking at our first official glimpses of the Ocarina of Time remake revealed so far, it seems like it’s definitely getting a similar treatment. A brand new, fully voiced narrator introduces the story and our fairy-less elf, Link, as handwoven tapestries fade to reveal a beautifully recreated shot of when we first see our hero in the original game, now with vibrant lighting and tons of meticulous little details to flesh out his cold but cozy little house in a tree. Some of these details are present in the original game and some of them aren’t, but it all feels familiar. There's not much to go on just yet (despite the game coming to Switch 2 at some point in the next six months) but the debut trailer is already telling us that Nintendo isn’t simply improving some textures and remastering some songs.
paragraphs.cn: 从目前官方首次公开的《时之笛》重制版片段来看，它显然也得到了类似的待遇。一位全新的、全程配音的叙述者介绍故事和没有精灵的精灵林克，手织挂毯淡出，展现出原版游戏中我们第一次见到英雄时的精美重制画面，现在有了鲜艳的光照和大量细致入微的细节，来充实他那间寒冷但舒适的小树屋。其中一些细节在原版游戏中就有，一些则没有，但一切都感觉很熟悉。目前透露的信息还不多（尽管游戏将在未来六个月内登陆Switch 2），但首支预告片已经告诉我们，任天堂并非仅仅改进一些纹理和重制一些音乐。

paragraphs.en: So why take two Nintendo 64 classics that already got 3DS remakes and remake them yet again for Switch 2 this year? Well for starters, those remakes were designed entirely around a dual screen handheld device that most people don’t have access to in 2026. Not only is original 3DS hardware becoming increasingly more expensive as the years go by and the nostalgia-driven aftermarket for old video games continues to grow, but putting dual screen games on a single-screen console like the Nintendo Switch 2 isn’t easy. It’s why so many fantastic DS and 3DS games are stuck on those systems, never to be ported to modern Nintendo hardware. The Ocarina and Star Fox remakes, plus countless other gems, are games designed for tiny low-res dual screen devices, and porting them to a single screen device like the Switch 2 would require the entire game to be reworked from the ground up. And if you’re going to put in that much effort to port a 3DS remake of an N64 game to the Nintendo Switch 2, you’d might as well just go all-in and remake the game again.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，为什么要把两款已经有过3DS重制版的N64经典游戏，在今年再次为Switch 2重制呢？首先，那些重制版完全是围绕双屏掌机设计的，而大多数人在2026年已经无法方便地玩到它们了。不仅原版3DS硬件随着时间推移和怀旧驱动的二手游戏市场持续增长而变得越来越贵，而且将双屏游戏放到像Nintendo Switch 2这样的单屏主机上也不容易。这就是为什么那么多优秀的DS和3DS游戏被困在那套系统上，永远无法移植到现代任天堂硬件上。《时之笛》和《星际火狐》的重制版，以及其他无数珍宝，都是为小型低分辨率双屏设备设计的游戏，将它们移植到像Switch 2这样的单屏设备上，需要从头到尾重新制作整个游戏。而如果你要花这么大功夫把一款N64游戏的3DS重制版移植到Nintendo Switch 2上，那还不如干脆全力以赴，再次重制这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: (Here’s me manifesting a similar treatment for A Link Between Worlds. And hey, listen, maybe even Phantom Hourglass and Spirit Tracks while I’m at it. The Switch 2 has a touch screen, after all!)
paragraphs.cn: （我在此祈愿《众神的三角力量2》也能得到类似待遇。嘿，听着，既然都这样了，也许《幻影沙漏》和《灵魂轨迹》也行。毕竟Switch 2有触摸屏！）

paragraphs.en: So the lack of easy access to the 3DS is one reason why now is the perfect time for an Ocarina remake. But there’s another, equally frustrating one: the massive gap between Zelda games. There was a six-year gap between the release of Breath of the Wild and Tears of the Kingdom, despite the fact that Tears used so many of BotW’s assets, systems, and locations. This gigantic sandbox take on the Zelda formula is clearly the blueprint going forward, which means – like most big video game sequels these days – a five or six year wait between sequels seems likely for the foreseeable future. That’s a pretty untenable stretch of time for a franchise to go without any notable game releases, which is why since Breath of the Wild launched in 2017 we’ve seen smaller Zelda games like Cadence of Hyrule , the Link’s Awakening remake , and Echoes of Wisdom launch, keeping Zelda fans occupied during those long waits. If waiting six or more years between big open world Zelda games is the new normal now, that means we’re at least three years away from the next mainline Zelda. An Ocarina of Time remake is the perfect thing to help hold us over, and much easier to make, too. After all, the entire blueprint for it has existed for almost 30 years.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，3DS不易获取是现在重制《时之笛》的完美时机的原因之一。但还有另一个同样令人沮丧的原因：《塞尔达》系列作品之间的巨大空窗期。《旷野之息》和《王国之泪》之间相隔了六年，尽管《王国之泪》使用了大量《旷野之息》的素材、系统和地点。这种巨大的沙盒式《塞尔达》玩法显然是未来的蓝图，这意味着——就像如今大多数大型游戏续作一样——在可预见的未来，续作之间很可能要等上五六年。对于一个系列来说，这么长时间没有值得注意的游戏发售是相当难以为继的，这就是为什么自2017年《旷野之息》推出以来，我们看到了像《海拉鲁节奏》、《织梦岛》重制版和《智慧再现》这样的小型《塞尔达》游戏，让粉丝们在漫长的等待中有所寄托。如果大型开放世界《塞尔达》游戏之间等待六年或更长时间成为新常态，那就意味着我们距离下一部主线《塞尔达》至少还有三年。《时之笛》重制版是帮助我们度过这段时期的完美选择，而且制作起来也容易得多。毕竟，它的整个蓝图已经存在了近30年。

paragraphs.en: While a remake is the perfect solution to that long wait between sequels, there’s also something else to consider. The Legend of Zelda is about to have a gigantic big screen moment on April 30, 2027 – just a few months after the Ocarina of Time remake is set to be released. A live-action Zelda movie hitting theaters will introduce a whole new audience to this series for the first time. Having a stunning new remake of the most iconic Zelda game on store shelves and at the top of the Nintendo Switch 2’s eShop in time for the movie’s premiere makes perfect sense. After all, it’s happened before: Super Mario Galaxy 1 and 2 got Nintendo Switch remasters six months before The Super Mario Galaxy Movie premiered. Kids saw the Mario movie, wanted a Mario game to play, and Nintendo made sure they had something ready, even if it was something many of us played ages ago.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然重制版是解决续作漫长等待的完美方案，但还有另一件事需要考虑。《塞尔达传说》即将在2027年4月30日迎来一个巨大的大银幕时刻——就在《时之笛》重制版计划发售的几个月后。一部真人版《塞尔达》电影上映，将首次为这个系列带来全新的观众。在电影首映之际，让一款惊艳的、最具标志性的《塞尔达》游戏重制版上架商店并占据Nintendo Switch 2 eShop的榜首，这完全合情合理。毕竟，以前就有过先例：《超级马力欧银河》1和2在《超级马力欧银河大电影》首映前六个月获得了Nintendo Switch重制版。孩子们看了马力欧电影，想玩马力欧游戏，任天堂确保他们有所准备，即使那是我们很多人很久以前就玩过的游戏。

paragraphs.en: Imagine being a 10 year old who walks out of the Zelda movie, heads home, grabs their Nintendo Switch 2, and plays Ocarina of Time for the first time in their lives. It’s hard not to be envious of experiencing a moment like that. Also, consider this: it’s been almost three decades since the original game launched, and it seems pretty likely that a sizable number of people who played it back then now have children of their own. Hmm, if only there was a Zelda game about experiencing how the world changes from the perspective of a child and the perspective of an adult…
paragraphs.cn: 想象一下，一个10岁的孩子走出《塞尔达》电影院，回到家，拿起Nintendo Switch 2，人生中第一次玩《时之笛》。很难不羡慕能体验那样时刻的人。另外，再想想：原版游戏发售已经快三十年了，当年玩过它的人中，相当一部分现在很可能已经有了自己的孩子。嗯，要是有一款《塞尔达》游戏是关于从孩子和成年人的视角体验世界如何变化就好了……

paragraphs.en: Of course, it’s not all magical when it comes to remakes. Across all forms of media, remakes of beloved classics are historically a tricky balance of trying to modernize something ancient while honoring its original vision, and Ocarina of Time will be no exception. Should Nintendo make Hyrule field bigger, since present day gamers trained on massive open worlds expect a grand sandbox to play in? Or should they retain the scale of the original because the whole game was designed around it? Should they streamline the notoriously cumbersome Water Temple even further than they did in the 3DS remake? And what about including content from previous Ocarina of Time releases, like the awesome Master Mode, which remixes the dungeon layouts along with additional tweaks and challenges? Expectations for a project like this are understandably through the roof, and while the Ocarina of Time and Star Fox remakes on 3DS largely played it safe, Nintendo did make a few changes in the Majora’s Mask 3DS remake (such as altering some boss fights and the overall save mechanic) that weren’t as well received. Even the smallest change deemed incorrect by the community could stain this remake’s legacy.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，重制版并非全是魔法。在所有媒体形式中，经典作品的重制历来都是在现代化古老作品与尊重原作愿景之间寻求微妙平衡，而《时之笛》也不会例外。任天堂是否应该把海拉鲁平原做得更大，因为如今的玩家在大型开放世界中成长，期待一个宏大的沙盒来探索？还是应该保留原版的规模，因为整个游戏都是围绕它设计的？他们是否应该比3DS重制版更进一步，简化那个出了名繁琐的水之神殿？还有，是否应该包含之前《时之笛》版本的内容，比如出色的大师模式，它重新混合了迷宫布局并增加了额外调整和挑战？对这个项目的期望值自然高得离谱，虽然3DS上的《时之笛》和《星际火狐》重制版基本采取了稳妥路线，但任天堂在《姆吉拉的假面》3DS重制版中做的一些改动（比如修改了一些Boss战和整体存档机制）并不那么受欢迎。即使是社区认为不正确的最小改动，也可能玷污这款重制版的声誉。

paragraphs.en: Regardless of the changes it makes, and regardless of if it becomes the definitive version, now is clearly the perfect time for an Ocarina of Time remake. The original and its 2011 remake are largely inaccessible to modern players, we’ll be waiting years for the follow-up to Tears of the Kingdom, and the movie is right around the corner in 2027. All the stars are aligned. And I can’t wait. Ocarina of Time is one of my favorite games of all time, and I’ll get to experience it again in a way it’s never looked before, this time alongside my daughter (we recently finished up Twilight Princess, which is still fantastic, by the way). It’s awesome that younger gamers will get to play this game as if it's a brand new Zelda game, because for many of them, it will be.
paragraphs.cn: 无论它做了哪些改动，也无论它是否能成为最终版本，现在显然是《时之笛》重制版的完美时机。原版和2011年的重制版对现代玩家来说基本无法触及，我们还要等上好几年才能玩到《王国之泪》的续作，而电影也将在2027年上映。所有条件都已成熟。我已经迫不及待了。《时之笛》是我有史以来最喜欢的游戏之一，我将以一种前所未有的方式再次体验它，这次是和我的女儿一起（顺便说一句，我们最近刚通关了《黄昏公主》，它依然很棒）。年轻玩家将能像玩一款全新的《塞尔达》游戏一样玩到这款作品，这真是太棒了，因为对其中许多人来说，它确实就是全新的。
